gxpci_raw_dma_state_s Struct Reference
[gxpci PCIe and StreamIO Data Transfer API]

This describes the Raw DMA channel-wide state, as opposed to queue-specific resource structure gxpci_resource_t. More...


Data Fields

unsigned int asid
 Application space ID.
unsigned int mac
 MAC number.
int barmem_fd
 File handle for barmem access.
unsigned int num_rd_t2h_queues
 Number of T2H queues.
unsigned int num_rd_h2t_queues
 Number of H2T queues.
unsigned long bar0_size
 Local BAR0 size.
unsigned long bar0_addr
 Local BAR0 base address.
int rd_q_intr_vec_base
 The MSI-X interrupt vector base number of the Raw DMA queues.
unsigned int msix_table_size
 MSI-X table size in bytes.
void * msix_table_base
 Pointer to MSI-X table.
void * mmio_mem
 Backing memory for MMIO registers, shared by all t2h/h2t queues.
void * h2t_dma_mem
 Memory for Pull DMA descriptor rings, shared by all h2t queues.
void * t2h_dma_mem
 Memory for Push DMA descriptor rings, shared by all t2h queues.

Detailed Description

This describes the Raw DMA channel-wide state, as opposed to queue-specific resource structure gxpci_resource_t.

This should contain state information that is used once at app init time. A Raw DMA channel may include multiple T2H and H2T queues.
